ground_truth.title: Skin Care Treatments
ground_truth.main_content:
Skin Care Services
TAKE YOUR SKIN CARE GAME TO THE NEXT LEVEL
When your skin needs more specialized care, advanced skin care services can get you even closer to achieving your skin goals.
Book a skin care service now
YOU KNOW YOUR SKIN. WE KNOW SKIN CARE.
You know your skin better than anyone, and we know skin care. Share your skin goals with your esthetician and together you can map out a personalized skin care journey to achieve them. Based on your specific skin concerns, they can suggest the appropriate mix of skin care services and products to add to your at-home routine. Your best skin awaits, so let’s get glowing!
Take the skin care quiz
Microderm Infusion
With each pass, an innovative diamond-tipped wand exfoliates, extracts debris, and infuses a choice of serums so you can show off brighter, smoother skin. With minimal downtime, it’s the perfect way to get glowing before a special event!
See service details Book now
Dermaplaning
You may have heard all the buzz surrounding dermaplaning and what it can do for your skin. GREAT NEWS: You can now experience it for yourself at participating Massage Envy franchised locations!
See service details Book now
Chemical Peel
During your session, experienced estheticians utilize PCA SKIN advanced treatments for deep exfoliation, resulting in a refreshed, more radiant-looking you.
See service details Book now
Zero Downtime Peel
This innovative peel offers no expected visible peeling or redness, so you can get glowing and get going! It’s the perfect way to prep your skin for a special occasion.
See service details Book now
We put the ‘care’ in skin care
The sheer volume of information available on the internet about skin care can be overwhelming. How do you know which trends are worth adopting and which you should skip? With a minimum of 500 hours of education and 20 hours of ongoing specialty training, the estheticians employed by franchised locations are skin-savvy, experienced professionals you can trust to guide you towards achieving your best skin.
About our providers
Use the products the pros do
The skin care services offered at select Massage Envy franchised locations feature innovative, efficacious products from industry-leading skin care brands. Those same products are available for you to purchase and use at home, to keep you on track to achieving your skin goals.
Explore skin care products
Featured Articles
New at Massage Envy: Oxygenating Treatment
Ever notice how your face feels dull and tired after a long flight or a busy week? That’s your skin crying out for oxygen. Now, you can breathe new life into your skin with Massage ...
How often should you get a facial?
Facials paired with targeted home-care products can deliver impressive results.
Beat the Heat: Summer Skin Care Tips You Need to Know
Don’t sweat your skin care routine this summer. Make the most of it with these expert-backed tips.
Read more articles
SKIN CARE THAT PUTS THE FOCUS WHERE IT BELONGS: ON YOU
The best skin care services aren’t one-size-fits-all solutions... They’re targeted to address your specific skin concerns and goals. Because your ME Time is all about YOU.
Explore concern-focused skin care
Individual results may vary based on user, skin care regimen, and services provided.
